title: Run eval suite on new tools and agents before push
description: Why: 15 new tools and 5 domain agents were added but only typechecked — no smoke tests or evals run against them. Need to verify correctness before pushing. What: Add AIMock fixtures for new tools, run AIMock eval (npm run eval:mock), run live eval if NCA is available, then git init + first commit + push.
close_reason: All 7 eval datasets pass (21 total cases). AIMock fixtures updated, aimock.json changed to directory mode matching CI.

title: Build template-mastra-nca initial template (phases 1-14)
description: Why: Establish a reusable Mastra agent template for NCA Toolkit integrations. What: Fork base template, strip lead-intake assets, add NCA env vars and HTTP client, implement 5 core tools, scorers, mediaProcessor agent, smoke tests, eval gate, AIMock eval, CI workflow, docs, and final verification. All 14 phases complete per SPEC/PROGRESS.md.
close_reason: Completed retroactively — work done without issue tracking

title: Add 15 new NCA tool endpoints
description: Why: Original template only wrapped 5 of 20 NCA API endpoints. All endpoints needed for complete coverage. What: Added tools for trim-video, concatenate-videos, cut-video, split-video, video-thumbnail, concatenate-audio, cut-media, generate-ass, media-metadata, detect-silence, convert-media, convert-to-mp3, screenshot-webpage, image-to-video, get-jobs-status.
close_reason: Completed retroactively — work done without issue tracking

title: Add supervisor + 5 domain subagents (video, audio, media, image, toolkit)
description: Why: Needed agentic layer over all 20 NCA tools, organized by API domain (/v1/video/*, /v1/audio/*, /v1/media/*, /v1/image/*, /v1/toolkit/*). What: Created videoAgent, audioAgent, mediaAgent, imageAgent, toolkitAgent, and mediaSupervisor that delegates by domain. Replaced earlier per-endpoint agent design.
close_reason: Completed retroactively — work done without issue tracking
